discovery.name: GL_LEDGER_OPEN_PERIOD
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT gl.ledger_id AS LEDGER_ID, gl.name AS LEDGER_NAME, gl.currency_code AS CURRENCY_CODE, gl.chart_of_accounts_id AS COA_ID, (SELECT MIN(gas.access_set_id) FROM gl_access_sets gas WHERE gas.default_ledger_id = gl.ledger_id AND gas.automatically_created_flag = 'Y') AS DAS_ID, (SELECT MIN(ps.period_name) FROM gl_period_statuses ps WHERE ps.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id AND ps.application_id = 101 AND ps.closing_status = 'O' AND ps.adjustment_period_flag = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ps.start_date AND ps.end_date) AS OPEN_PERIOD, TO_CHAR((SELECT MIN(ps.start_date) FROM gl_period_statuses ps WHERE ps.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id AND ps.application_id = 101 AND ps.closing_status = 'O' AND ps.adjustment_period_flag = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ps.start_date AND ps.end_date), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS ACCT_DATE, TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS DATE_CREATED, 'Spreadsheet' AS JE_SOURCE, 'Adjustment' AS JE_CATEGORY FROM gl_ledgers gl WHERE gl.object_type_code = 'L' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gl_period_statuses ps WHERE ps.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id AND ps.application_id = 101 AND ps.closing_status = 'O' AND ps.adjustment_period_flag = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ps.start_date AND ps.end_date) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gl_code_combinations gcc WHERE gcc.chart_of_accounts_id = gl.chart_of_accounts_id AND gcc.enabled_flag = 'Y' AND NVL(gcc.detail_posting_allowed_flag,'Y') = 'Y' AND gcc.account_type = 'E' AND NVL(gcc.end_date_active, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE) ORDER BY CASE WHEN gl.name = 'US Primary Ledger' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, gl.name) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: GL_VALID_ACCOUNT
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT gcc.segment1 AS SEG1, gcc.segment2 AS SEG2, gcc.segment3 AS SEG3, gcc.segment4 AS SEG4, gcc.segment5 AS SEG5, gcc.segment6 AS SEG6 FROM gl_code_combinations gcc WHERE gcc.chart_of_accounts_id = (SELECT gl.chart_of_accounts_id FROM gl_ledgers gl WHERE gl.object_type_code = 'L' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gl_period_statuses ps WHERE ps.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id AND ps.application_id = 101 AND ps.closing_status = 'O' AND ps.adjustment_period_flag = 'N' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ps.start_date AND ps.end_date) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gl_code_combinations g2 WHERE g2.chart_of_accounts_id = gl.chart_of_accounts_id AND g2.enabled_flag = 'Y' AND NVL(g2.detail_posting_allowed_flag,'Y') = 'Y' AND g2.account_type = 'E' AND NVL(g2.end_date_active, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE) ORDER BY CASE WHEN gl.name = 'US Primary Ledger' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, gl.name FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) AND gcc.enabled_flag = 'Y' AND NVL(gcc.detail_posting_allowed_flag,'Y') = 'Y' AND gcc.account_type = 'E' AND NVL(gcc.end_date_active, SYSDATE+1) > SYSDATE ORDER BY gcc.code_combination_id) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

base_read.comment: Preferred: direct read of the GL_JE base tables by the prefix-stamped batch name. On demo pods the BIP ApplicationDB_FSCM GL_JE_* replica lags the transactional tables by many hours, so this may return no row for a just-created journal even though Journal Import wrote it. When that happens, the base-write is confirmed instead by GL_INTERFACE.STATUS = 'P' with an assigned JE_HEADER_ID (see base_read_fallback), which is the interface table's authoritative record that the row imported into the base tables.
base_read.sql: SELECT SUBSTR(b.name, 1, INSTR(b.name, ' ') - 1) AS REF1, TO_CHAR(MIN(h.je_header_id)) AS JE_HEADER_ID, TO_CHAR(SUM(l.entered_dr)) AS TOT_DR, TO_CHAR(SUM(l.entered_cr)) AS TOT_CR, MIN(b.name) AS BATCH_NAME FROM gl_je_batches b JOIN gl_je_headers h ON h.je_batch_id = b.je_batch_id JOIN gl_je_lines l ON l.je_header_id = h.je_header_id WHERE b.name LIKE '${PREFIX}RT-JNL-G1%' GROUP BY SUBSTR(b.name, 1, INSTR(b.name, ' ') - 1)

base_read_fallback.comment: Interface-side proof that the good journal reached the GL base tables: STATUS='P' (Processed) with the base JE_HEADER_ID that Journal Import assigned. Directly readable immediately, unaffected by the GL_JE replica lag.
base_read_fallback.sql: SELECT gi.reference1 AS REF1, TO_CHAR(MIN(gi.je_header_id)) AS JE_HEADER_ID, TO_CHAR(SUM(gi.entered_dr)) AS TOT_DR, TO_CHAR(SUM(gi.entered_cr)) AS TOT_CR, MIN(gi.status) AS STATUS FROM gl_interface gi WHERE gi.group_id = ${PREFIX} AND gi.status = 'P' GROUP BY gi.reference1

interface_read.sql: SELECT gi.reference1 AS REF1, gi.status || ' - ' || SUBSTR(gi.status_description, 1, 200) AS STATUS_ERR, gi.status AS STATUS, TO_CHAR(gi.code_combination_id) AS CCID, TO_CHAR(gi.je_line_num) AS LINE_NUM FROM gl_interface gi WHERE gi.group_id = ${PREFIX} AND gi.status <> 'P'
